creator: neil@darlow.co.uk
text:
Martin,

I have a scenario where I use the secure_login plugin. This plugin is
enabled in the main squirrelmail configuration and I use the
disable_plugins feature of the vlogin plugin to disable secure_login for
some of my virtualhosts.

Now, compatibility < 2.0.5 doesn't work for vlogin-1.3.9 and, it looks
like, the disable_plugins feature isn't working for secure_login for
compatibility-2.0.6.

Paul Leisnewsky (is that correct?) is looking into this scenario but he
suggests that secure_login may not be working with compatibility-2.0.6
although there could also be problems associated with his latest changes
to vlogin.

In any event, we have one (and possibly more) scenarios that are broken
and compatibility-2.0.6 could be responsible. Until we know where the
breakage is, I think updating compatibility is not wise and that puts a
block on vlogin-1.3.9. Alexander has indicated that he can't update
compatibility until later this week anyhow.
